subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and made manifest that which was hidden from eyes and sight. Verily, He is come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر ما کان مستورا عن العیون و الابصار انه اتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
